title: Vacancy for Category Manager at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd!
